# Baby Steps – Newborn & Child Clinic
> Pediatric and newborn care clinic in Neelbad, South Bhopal, led by Dr. Sudarshan Dev Arya (DNB, PGPN) and Dr. Manisha Bangarwa Arya (DNB, Neonatology Fellowship). Vaccination, newborn care, growth monitoring, developmental assessment.

## Key pages
- [Doctors](https://babystepsnewbornclinic.com/doctors): Credentials of both pediatric specialists.
- [Services](https://babystepsnewbornclinic.com/services): Pediatric services incl. vaccination, NICU follow-up, growth monitoring.
- [Vaccination schedule tool](https://babystepsnewbornclinic.com/tools/vaccination-schedule): IAP-aligned immunization timeline.
- [Growth calculator tool](https://babystepsnewbornclinic.com/tools/growth-calculator): WHO-standard height/weight percentile checker.
- [Milestone tracker tool](https://babystepsnewbornclinic.com/tools/milestone-tracker): Developmental milestone tracking checklist.
- [Blog](https://babystepsnewbornclinic.com/blog): Pediatrician-authored parent education articles.
- [Contact](https://babystepsnewbornclinic.com/contact): Neelbad, Bhopal · +91 62625 60101.

## Key facts
- Address: 227/1, Near Durga Mata Mandir, Pooja Colony, Neelbad, Bhopal, MP 462044
- Phone: +91 62625 60101 · Landline: 0755-4565588 · Email: contact@babystepsnewbornclinic.com
- Hours: Mon–Sat 10:00 AM–9:00 PM, Sun 10:00 AM–1:00 PM
- Consultants at Rainbow Children's Hospital & Apollo SAGE Hospital, Bhopal
- Areas Served: Neelbad, Kolar, Bawadia Kalan, Ratibad, South Bhopal
